message:
Command `
# 25m57s CPU / ~7 min elapsed. Pipe log stuck at 1926 bytes.
# The pipe might be getting blocked again!
# Let me check

LIBPID=1100961
ORPID=1101105

echo "=== Checking for pipe block ==="
SC=$(cat /proc/$ORPID/syscall 2>/dev/null)
echo "OpenROAD syscall: $SC"
T1=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
sleep 3
T2=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
echo "CPU time: $T1 → $T2"
echo ""

# Check if Python drainer is alive
echo "=== Drainer process ==="
ps aux | grep "drt2_pipe\|python3.*pid\|nonblock" | grep -v grep | head -5

# Check if pipe drainer process is alive
DRAINER=$(ps aux | grep python3 | grep -v librelane | grep -v "grep\|websock" | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CMD:"$11}' | head -5)
echo "Python processes: $DRAINER"

# Manually drain the pipe
echo ""
echo "=== Manual pipe drain ==="
dd if=/proc/$LIBPID/fd/11 bs=4096 count=256 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null
echo "After drain - pipe log:"
wc -c /tmp/drt2_pipe.log
tail -15 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log
` executed with exit code -1.

function.name: execute_bash
